name: barwise
description: ORM 2 modeling tool for data engineers and architects

scripts.circular: madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx packages/core/src/ packages/diagram/src/ packages/diagram-ui/src/ packages/llm/src/ packages/code-analysis/src/ packages/dbt/src/ packages/formats/src/ packages/cli/src/ packages/mcp/src/ packages/vscode/src/
scripts.publint: publint packages/core && publint packages/diagram && publint packages/llm && publint packages/cli && publint packages/mcp
